examples: He gave me a piece of paternal advice.
His paternal grandparents, a steward and a housekeeper, possessed even less status, having been servants, and Dickens later concealed their background.
I was brought up by my paternal aunt.
My paternal haplogroup (R1b1b2a1a) turns out to be from the most common in Western Europe.
Rising numbers of women in work may also have eroded a paternal sense of responsibility.
